title: Quax 16x
description: A default edit PvP pack that includes much QOL features for PvP
body:
A default edit PvP pack that includes much QOL features such as shorter swords and transparent inventories.

Have a look at some of the textures:

![Some items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/584d3928d925efde73d781c6a0f9275969874933.png)
![Some blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3263f56490969f141d1e31c498b499905b2190fc.png)
